string 2: It might have started already... I sure hope that he's okay...
That Digimon just now is the largest ever observed.

Anomalies are harbingers of further tragedy. Odds are 
there's more—and worse—yet to come.
We have to nip this in the bud. That's our mission.
I will protect the civilians from anomalies!{next}

I have a report for you, Agent. The latest update patch is
available for your Digivice.

You now have access to Agent Skills. They should be a great help
in executing your mission. Go on. Give them a try.

It's getting worse... The fighting on the roof may have started
already... We have to hurry!
Wh-What?! What in the world is going on?!

All this rubble came crashing down all of a sudden and I
thought I was trapped!

But then you showed up and cleared the rubble away! But I
still have no idea what's happening!

An attack? Is that what caused the crash just now? The
whole building shook like crazy!

All this rubble came crashing down all of a sudden and I
thought I was trapped!

But then you showed up and cleared the rubble away! But I
still have no idea what's happening!
I don't know! All of a sudden, this rubble came raining down...
I just want to get back to my friends～!
Can you fly to the other side?{next}
Wanna get out of here, with me?
I don't think I can... Just look how puny my wings are!

You did clear away that rubble for me, though... And maybe
it's just my imagination, but...

...I feel like I've "seen" you somewhere before, so I'm thinking 
you probably aren't a bad person.
...Okay, fine. I'll give it a try!

But... you did clear away that rubble for me... so maybe I 
should trust you...
F-From here? You want me to fly to the other side from here?
Yeah... I guess it does look pretty far...{next}
B-But I guess there really isn't any other way, is there...?
Okay, I'll try... but I'm not guaranteeing we'll make it!
We're going to make an emergency landing... right there!
We're going to make an emergency landing... right there!
I-I'm sorry. I think we ended up further away...

I also want to apologize for causing the Digimon conflict 
in the human world.

I wish I could help from here on out, but I'll only be a 
burden to you. I think it's better for me to rest here.
That shape and structure... It's man-made, no doubt about it.

Why did the government close this place off to begin with?　
Is something afoot that not even ADAMAS is aware of?

The two of us may be in over our heads. I'll make an urgent
request for reinforcements.

The nation's security agencies won't be of much help.
That's why we exist. We must fulfill our mission!
What's all this?! Why are Digimon gathering on the roof?
